name: env-direnv
description: Activate direnv-managed environment for workspace subprocesses

settings.label: Timeout (seconds)
settings.description: Maximum time to wait for `direnv export json`. A cold .envrc that triggers `nix develop` or a heavy mise toolchain commonly takes 60–120 seconds on first run; raise this when a workspace fails with `direnv timed out`. Per-repo overrides live in Repo Settings → Environment.
